title: DarkModeGUI
description: this Minecraft texture pack makes most GUI in Minecraft dark
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc4ce8c93c7d3af336a7240bab74bd4ab9cb19cc_0.webp)

![dev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824664d6a0afc9a015ab321948e63d22b0a49658_0.webp)
> 
> **DarkModeGui** is a sleek, modern GUI overhaul designed to bring a smooth and consistent dark theme to Minecraft’s user interface. This pack replaces the game’s bright, dated menus with refined dark tones that reduce eye strain and create a more immersive atmosphere. Every screen—inventory, crafting, chests, settings, and more—features improved contrast, cleaner visuals, and a polished, minimal aesthetic that feels both modern and easy on the eyes. DarkModeGui aims to enhance readability, boost visual comfort, and provide a unified style without straying too far from Minecraft’s familiar look. Whether you’re playing in survival, managing servers, or building for hours, this pack delivers a calm, stylish, and functional dark-themed experience across the entire game.
> 
![dev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824664d6a0afc9a015ab321948e63d22b0a49658_0.webp)

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75acfb9afcd54c5655a2e6054ddbfcdc03cf0809_0.webp)
